reference: Hi, fifteen days after in vitro fertilization frozen embryo transfer, the blood test result is seven. Two days after the blood test, it is only two. I am feeling tired, have back pain, slight cramping in the left abdomen, vomit sometimes, and have a loss of appetite. Now, three days after the second blood test, I have brown discharge and feel chilled and sleepy. Is this a sign of my period, or am I pregnant?
text: Hi. Fifteen days after in vitro fertilization, frozen embryo transfer, the blood test result is seven. Two days after the blood test, it is only two. I am feeling tired, have back pain, slight cramping in the left abdomen, vomit sometimes, and have a loss of appetite. Now, three days after the second blood test, I have brown discharge and feel chilled and sleepy. Is this a sign of my period, or am I pregnant?
